channel.title: nlin.CG updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: nlin.CG updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: Stationary Measures and Mean Flux Depending on Multiple Conserved Quantities in a Stochastic Cellular Automaton
item.description: arXiv:2605.28052v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We analyze a stochastic 5-neighbor cellular automaton with several conserved quantities, including the particle density. By examining the eigenvalue problem of the associated transition matrix, we derive an explicit formula for the stationary distribution on each irreducible component, in which the weight of each configuration is expressed in terms of the numbers of occurrences of two specific local patterns. This analysis further allows us to theoretically derive the dependence of the mean flux on the conserved quantities. In particular, we recover the mean flux formula in the deterministic case by taking the zero-noise limit of the system.
item.dc:creator: Kazushige Endo, Shinsuke Iwao, Hidetomo Nagai, Yushi Nakano

item.title: Counting number-conserving cellular automata with radius 1
item.description: arXiv:2605.31157v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: This text is also a program that computes the number of one-dimensional number-conserving cellular automata with radius 1. At the end of the text, the numbers of such automata with up to 7 cell states are shown.
item.dc:creator: Markus Redeker
